MINI MINUTES: Judge Michael Begert; Clerk: sravinantapricha ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority, is present. Represented by Tim Gooseman

Attorney, Tony Ruch, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Tunatunaolevao Fai, is present.
Attorney,Aaron Palley, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem David May, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502b, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-26-2011 is vacated.
